description: Canonical bounded-decay policy. Append-first ledgers are necessary but not sufficient; over time their auto-loaded session footprint grows unbounded. This policy authorizes per-target distillation rules. Renderers and skills (lesson-distiller, handoff-archiver) translate it into compaction passes that move historical content to docs/archive/ while preserving wisdom verbatim. Distillation is reversible by design.

targets.description: Move entries with Status: promoted to the archive. Replace each in the main file with a one-line index pointer. Active and superseded entries stay.
Move all but the most recent N sprint sections to the archive. Replace them with a compact summary table in HANDOFF.md.
Delete (do not archive) timestamped triad validation run directories beyond the most recent N. These are evidence artifacts; the latest few suffice for audit.
